content.text: You ask Claude for something “substantial” and self‑contained (e.g. “build a simple todo app UI in HTML/CSS”, “draft a 3‑page strategy doc”).
Claude detects that the output is better as a structured artifact and renders it in the
next to the chat, rather than as plain text only.
in that panel (e.g. tweak copy, modify code, adjust a diagram) instead of copying into an external editor.
You can then ask Claude to “update this artifact” or “refactor the code in the artifact” and it modifies the artifact in place, giving you an iterative build loop inside chat.
attached to the conversation or project, so you can reopen/update them later instead of scrolling to find the original answer.
